description_long: This is a modern, two-tiered urban cabinet or shelf structure with a minimalist design, featuring a large rectangular base and a slightly smaller upper section, both with flat, overhanging tops. The lower section is supported by a central pillar and an angled support beam, while the upper section is offset, creating an open space beneath it. A set of steps or shelves is visible on one side, suggesting access or storage functionality. The surfaces are smooth and appear to be made of painted or coated metal, with a muted color palette of light gray, white, and hints of beige. The overall form is geometric and functional, suitable for use in public spaces such as parks, plazas, or modern urban environments. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the structure is likely intended for freestanding placement.
description: A modern, two-tiered urban cabinet or shelf with a geometric, minimalist design, featuring open shelving and smooth, light-colored surfaces. The structure includes a central pillar, angled support, and a set of steps or shelves on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelving, central pillar, angled support, and visible steps or shelves on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the offset upper section and the overhanging tops of both tiers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of both tiers and the supporting pillar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the open space beneath the upper section and the steps or shelves on the left.
